title: glaucium flavum
intro: Glaucium flavum, also known as yellow horned poppy, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive horn-shaped seed pods. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as glaucine and protopine. The health benefits of Glaucium flavum include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
